title: ecbolium microstachyum
intro: Ecbolium microstachyum, also known as 'Kevu' or 'Pilang', is a plant species native to tropical regions, particularly in the Western Ghats of India, which is used in traditional medicine. It is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Ecbolium microstachyum include its ability to aid in digestion, treat respiratory issues, and reduce fever. The herbal preparations of this plant include infusions and decoctions, which are typically used in Ayurvedic medicine to treat various ailments.
